meta.title: Why do all these new stealth jets look like the F-22?
meta.description:
With a record number of new stealth aircraft in service and headed there around the world, it's tough not to notice how similar many of them look. What's the deal with that?

#f22 #f35 #stealth #j20 #j31 #fc31 #tfx #fighterjets #fighter #airpower #military #usmilitary #tech #technololgy
